channel.title: CS on Three Liters
channel.description: Recent content in CS on Three Liters

item.title: Adversarial Nets Papers
item.description:
First Paper

Key word Published Title Paper
Link		 Code
Link		 Progress
GAN NIPS 2014 Generative Adversarial Networks arXiv github todo

Image Translation

Key word Published Title Paper
Link		 Code
Link		 Progress
DTN Unsupervised Cross-Domain Image Generation arXiv github todo
pix2pix CVPR 2017 Image-to-Image Translation with Conditional Adversarial Networks CVPR pix2pix todo
DiscoGAN ICML 2017 Learning to Discover Cross-Domain Relations with Generative Adversarial Networks arXiv DiscoGAN-pytorch todo
CycleGAN CVPR 2017 Unpaired Image-to-Image Translation using Cycle-Consistent Adversarial Networks github.io cycleGAN
pytorch-CycleGAN-and-pix2pix 		todo
CoGAN NIPS 2016 Coupled Generative Adversarial Networks arXiv CoGAN-tensorflow todo
NIPS 2017 Unsupervised Image-to-Image Translation with Generative Adversarial Networks arXiv todo
DualGAN ICCV 2017 DualGAN: Unsupervised Dual Learning for Image-to-Image Translation arXiv github todo
pix2pixHD CVPR 2017 Unsupervised Image-to-Image Translation Networks arXiv github todo
XGAN ICML'18 XGAN: Unsupervised Image-to-Image Translation for Many-to-Many Mappings arXiv todo
UNIT NIPS 2017 UNIT: UNsupervised Image-to-image Translation Networks arXiv github todo
BicycleGAN NIPS 2017 Toward Multimodal Image-to-Image Translation arXiv github todo
MUNIT ECCV 2018 Multimodal Unsupervised Image-to-Image Translation arXiv github todo
Vid2vid NIPS 2018 Video-to-Video Synthesis arXiv github todo
motion transfer ICCV 2019 Everybody Dance Now arXiv github todo
Art2Real CVPR 2019 Art2Real: Unfolding the Reality of Artworks via Semantically-Aware Image-to-Image Translation arXiv todo
SelectionGAN CVPR 2019 oral Multi-Channel Attention Selection GAN with Cascaded Semantic Guidance for Cross-View Image Translation arXiv github todo
LGGAN CVPR 2020 Local Class-Specific and Global Image-Level Generative Adversarial Networks for Semantic-Guided Scene Generation arXiv github todo
StarGAN CVPR 2020 StarGAN v2: Diverse Image Synthesis for Multiple Domains arXiv github todo
structural-analogy Computer Graphics Forum Structural-analogy from a Single Image Pair arXiv github todo
Owner avatar
HiDT CVPR 2020 High-Resolution Daytime Translation Without Domain Labels arXiv github todo
tunit ICCV 2021 Rethinking the Truly Unsupervised Image-to-Image Translation arXiv github todo
self-conditioned gan CVPR 2020 Diverse Image Generation via Self-Conditioned GANs arXiv github todo
contrastive-unpaired-translation ECCV 2020 Contrastive Learning for Unpaired Image-to-Image Translation github.io github todo
VAE/GAN ICML 2016 Autoencoding beyond pixels using a learned similarity metric arXiv torch
tensorflow		 todo
CoGAN NIPS 2016 Coupled Generative Adversarial Networks arXiv torch
tensorflow		 todo
IcGAN NIPS 2016 Invertible Conditional GANs for image editing arXiv github todo
FaceAttributeManipulation CVPR 2017 Learning Residual Images for Face Attribute Manipulation arXiv github todo
Neural-Photo-Editor Neural Photo Editing with Introspective Adversarial Networks arXiv github todo
NeuralFaceEditing CVPR 2017 oral Neural Face Editing with Intrinsic Image Disentangling arXiv github todo
GeneGAN BMVC 2017 GeneGAN: Learning Object Transfiguration and Attribute Subspace from Unpaired Data arXiv github todo
TP-GAN ICCV 2017 Beyond Face Rotation: Global and Local Perception GAN for Photorealistic and Identity Preserving Frontal View Synthesis arXiv github todo
StarGAN CVPR 2018 StarGAN: Unified Generative Adversarial Networks for Multi-Domain Image-to-Image Translation arXiv github todo
AttGAN TIP(top Jounal) AttGAN: Facial Attribute Editing by Only Changing What You Want arXiv github todo
ELEGANT ECCV 2018 ELEGANT: Exchanging Latent Encodings with GAN for Transferring Multiple Face Attributes arXiv github todo
SGGAN ACM MM2018 oral Sparsely Grouped Multi-task Generative Adversarial Networks for Facial Attribute Manipulation arXiv github todo
GANimation ECCV 2018 oral GANimation: Anatomically-aware Facial Animation from a Single Image github.io github todo
ACM MM2018 Geometry Guided Adversarial Facial Expression Synthesis arXiv todo
STGAN CVPR 2019 STGAN: A Unified Selective Transfer Network for Arbitrary Image Attribute Editing arXiv github todo
3d guided fine-grained face manipulation arXiv todo
SC-FEGAN ICCV 2019 SC-FEGAN: Face Editing Generative Adversarial Network with User’s Sketch and Color arXiv github todo
IJCV 2019(Journal) A Survey of Deep Facial Attribute Analysis link todo
PA-GAN PA-GAN: Progressive Attention Generative Adversarial Network for Facial Attribute Editing arXiv github todo
SSCGAN ECCV 2020 SSCGAN: Facial Attribute Editing via StyleSkip Connections ECCV todo
CAFE-GAN ECCV 2020 CAFE-GAN: Arbitrary Face Attribute Editingwith Complementary Attention Feature arXiv todo

Link		 Code

(Representation)		 Unsupervised Representation Learning with Deep Convolutional Generative Adversarial Networks arXiv github todo

text2image ICML 2016 Generative Adversarial Text to Image Synthesis arXiv torch
tensorflow		 todo
improved GAN Goodfellow’s paper Improved Techniques for Training GANs arXiv github todo
PPGN CVPR 2017 Plug & Play Generative Networks: Conditional Iterative Generation of Images in Latent Space arXiv github todo
StackGAN ICCV 2017 Oral StackGAN: Text to Photo-realistic Image Synthesis with Stacked Generative Adversarial Networks arXiv github todo
improved_wgan NIPS 2017 camera-ready Improved Training of Wasserstein GANs arXiv github todo
BEGAN BEGAN: Boundary Equilibrium Generative Adversarial Networks arXiv github todo
ICLR 2018 paper Progressive Growing of GANs for Improved Quality, Stability, and Variation arXiv 1
2		 todo
SAGAN NIPS 2018 Self-Attention Generative Adversarial Networks arXiv github doing
BigGAN ICLR 2019 Large Scale GAN Training for High Fidelity Natural Image Synthesis arXiv github todo
StyleGAN CVPR 2019 A Style-Based Generator Architecture for Generative Adversarial Networks arXiv github todo
StyleGAN2 CVPR 2020 Analyzing and Improving the Image Quality of StyleGAN arXiv github todo
SinGAN ICCV 2019 best paper SinGAN: Learning a Generative Model from a Single Natural Image arXiv github todo
ICLR 2020 Spot Real or Not Real, that is the Question arXiv github todo
Training End-to-end Single Image Generators without GANs arXiv todo
ALAE CVPR 2020 Adversarial Latent Autoencoders arXiv github todo

Link		 Code

v4 Coarse-to-Fine Gaze Redirection with Numerical and Pictorial Guidance		 arXiv v1
arXiv v4		 todo

completion		 CVPR 2017 Generative face completion cvpr github todo

NLP

item.title: arXiv snaity
item.description:
Preview

References

ways to search for paper in computer vision field

item.title: How to find and collect papers in CS
item.description:
Document Retrieval

Organization Digital Library Link Remark
Association for Computing Machinery ACM ACM Digital Library https://dl.acm.org/ ⭐ ncku support
IEEE Computer Society IEEE Xplore DL https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/Xplore/home.jsp ⭐ncku support
Elsevier ScienceDirect - www.sciencedirect.com
Springer Springer Link www.springer.com
Wiley Wiley Online Lib onlinelibrary.wiley.com

How to find paper?

  1. Focus on target field: Generative model for image
  2. Google Search for “top # research paper in xxxx”
  3. Filter out the paper you are interested in

References

如何收集和整理论文（面向CS专业）
演算法與計算生物學實驗室\
